message:
fix: navbar dropdown stays open when moving from menu to button

The dropdown menus would close when moving the mouse from the dropdown
menu back to the button/trigger. This happened because the menu's
mouseleave event started a hide timeout, but moving to the button
(which is inside the same container) did not trigger a new mouseenter
on the container to cancel it.

Added a mouseenter listener to the dropdown button that clears any
pending hide timeout, ensuring the menu stays open when hovering
anywhere within the dropdown area.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
